testcase.name: test_operator_view_my_routes

failure.message: AssertionError: Route bc5c38b6-a6c2-4f22-ad40-feebc9b42086 belongs to different operator assert '30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8' == None

testcase.failure: tests/test_operator_scoped_features.py:105: in test_operator_view_my_routes assert route["operator_id"] == operator_id, f"Route {route.get('id')} belongs to different operator" E AssertionError: Route bc5c38b6-a6c2-4f22-ad40-feebc9b42086 belongs to different operator E assert '30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8' == None

testcase.name: test_operator_view_vehicles

failure.message: AssertionError: Vehicle f5d8db6d-85bc-4800-b098-34899d19584e belongs to different operator assert '30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8' == None

testcase.failure: tests/test_operator_scoped_features.py:225: in test_operator_view_vehicles assert vehicle["operator_id"] == operator_id, f"Vehicle {vehicle.get('id')} belongs to different operator" E AssertionError: Vehicle f5d8db6d-85bc-4800-b098-34899d19584e belongs to different operator E assert '30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8' == None
